current.en: Jordan's Spain reign supreme — Ferran Torres' extra-time stunner sends Beccy's Argentina home empty-handed and crowns La Roja world champions! 🏆🔴

history.en: Beccy's Argentina break Baz's heart with two Messi-assisted sucker-punches in the dying minutes — sorry Baz, it's the World Cup final without you! 🩵🤍💙
Jordan's Spain steamrolled Tarang's France 2-0 — no drama, no extra time, just a cold-blooded masterclass that sent La Roja straight to the World Cup final! 🔴🏆
Tarang, Jordan, Baz and Beccy are ALL through — a clean sweep for the away teams as Kate, Ben B, John and Andy watch their sides pack their bags! 🎉
Andy's Swiss neutrals are anything but neutral in Vancouver — they edge Jen's Colombia in a nervy shootout to march into the quarters! 🇨🇭🎉
Beccy's boys do the impossible — two goals down with 11 minutes to go, Argentina break Joe's Egyptian hearts with a 90th-minute winner to survive and advance! 🇦🇷💙
Ben B's Red Devils feast on Michael's home cooking — Belgium torch the co-hosts 4-1 to send the USMNT packing on their own turf! 🔥
Jordan's Spain break Martin's Portuguese hearts with a last-gasp Merino stunner — adios, Martin! 🇪🇸💔
Baz's brave Three Lions slay Ben's Azteca kings 3-2 in a World Cup classic — England are through, and the co-hosts are cooked! 🦁🌶️
John's Norway, powered by a Haaland brace, send Joe's Brazil packing — sorry Joe, the Vikings have spoken! 🪓⚽
Kate's Atlas Lions roar past Alex's co-hosts 3-0 — sorry, Alex, Morocco didn't get the maple syrup memo! 🦁🍁
Sorry, Martin — Tarang's France needed just one Mbappé penalty to send Paraguay packing and march into the quarterfinals! 🇫🇷⚽
Jen's Los Cafeteros serve James a piping-hot café solo — Colombia's Arias taps in the only goal to send Ghana's Black Stars home! ☕🇨🇴
Beccy's Boys survive the scare of the tournament — Messi & co. edge out Laura's Blue Sharks 3-2 in extra time, but don't let Beccy forget how close it got! 🦈🇦🇷
Joe's Pharaohs shatter Ben's Socceroo dreams from the spot — Salah and co march into the last 16 while Ben is left contemplating what might have been! 🇪🇬🔥
Andy's Swiss army marches on as Baz's Fennecs are sent packing — a clean 2-0 and not even a penalty drama to soften the blow! 🇨🇭🔥
Sorry Anthony, but Martin's Portugal shrugged off Modric, Perisic, and three disallowed goals to send Croatia packing with a stoppage-time Ramos header — your checkerboard dreams are toast! 🐓
Jordan's Spain put on a masterclass, sending Eleanor's Austria packing with a ruthless 3-0 hammering — no drama, no extra time, just pure Jordan dominance! 🇪🇸💥
Michael's USA march on as the Stars and Stripes send Michael's Bosnia packing 2-0 — even with 10 men, no mercy!
Ben B's Belgium break Megan's hearts — the Red Devils trailed 0-2 before Lukaku and Tielemans (twice!) staged an all-time comeback to send Senegal packing in extra time! 🔴😈
Baz's brave Three Lions survived an almighty scare before Kane's late double broke Emmy's Congolese hearts — Baz goes through, Emmy goes home!
